description.value: Aura faint enchantment; CL 3rd; Slot ring; Price 10,800 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION A ring of animal friendship always bears some sort of animal-like design in its craftsmanship. On command, this ring affects an animal as if the wearer had cast charm animal, causing the animal to regard the wearer as a trusted friend. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Forge Ring; Spells charm animal; Cost 5,400 gp.
